name: Charlie's Green Chile Tortilla Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 pound lean ground beef, See Notes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 12 corn tortillas into strips
2. Shred 3 cups jack or cheddar cheese (or a mix)
3. The Sauce:
- Combine 2 cans CAMPBELL'S Cream of mushroom soup, 1 can diced green chiles, chopped Vidalia onion, minced garlic, and chicken broth in a blender or food processor
- Add masa harina and fresh spinach, pureeing until smooth (more than one batch if necessary)
- Pour the mixture into a saucepan and bring to a boil
- Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until thickened and bubbly
4. Preheat oven to 325°F
5. In a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch baking dish, layer half the tortilla strips, beef mixture, another layer of tortilla strips, remaining beef mixture, green chile sauce, and shredded cheese
6. Bake for 50-55 minutes
